ogTitle: Narran Lake vs Narrangullen: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Narran Lake and Narrangullen.
heading: Narran Lake vs Narrangullen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Narran Lake, New South Wales and Narrangullen, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Narran Lake has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Narrangullen (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Narran Lake or Narrangullen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Narran Lake has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Narrangullen scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Narran Lake scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Narrangullen scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Narran Lake or Narrangullen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Narran Lake has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
